title: DeveloperMetadataLookup
description: Selects DeveloperMetadata that matches all of the specified fields.

locationType.description: Limits the selected developer metadata to that which has a matching location type.

locationMatchingStrategy.description: Determines how this lookup matches the location.

metadataId.description: Limits the selected developer metadata to that which has a matching metadata ID.

metadataKey.description: Limits the selected developer metadata to that which has a matching metadata key.

metadataValue.description: Limits the selected developer metadata to that which has a matching metadata value.

visibility.description: Limits the selected developer metadata to that which has a matching visibility.
